docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-22-2022 HEARING RE: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The "petition for writ of mandate" is ordered off calendar. The administrative record has not been provided to the court and petitioner has filed no memorandum.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
